evals.name: systematic-rotator-cuff
evals.prompt: Extract data and assess quality for this systematic review on rotator cuff comorbidities. Use all included studies.
evals.expected_output: extracted_claims.json with quantitative claims, semantic claims, quality ratings, and theme assignments for 4 articles

assertions.text: MCP tool extract_claims_regex was called with indices_file review/included_indices.json
review/extracted_claims.json exists after execution
extracted_claims.json contains 4 article entries
Each article has a semantic_claims array with at least one primary claim
Each article has a quality object with bias_risk and recommended_tool fields
Each article has a themes array with at least one theme
All year values in article entries are integers, not strings
stats.total_quantitative_claims equals the sum of all claims array lengths across articles
stats.total_semantic_claims equals the sum of all semantic_claims array lengths across articles
A summary table is printed with Author, Design, N, Bias Risk, Key Finding, Theme columns
Yamamoto article has a claim or semantic_claim containing 20.7%

evals.name: scoping-digital-pain
evals.prompt: Extract data from this scoping review on digital health for pain management. This is a scoping review so quality assessment is optional.
evals.expected_output: extracted_claims.json with claims and themes but quality assessment may be skipped or simplified per scoping review conventions

assertions.text: review/extracted_claims.json exists after execution
extracted_claims.json contains 3 article entries
Quality assessment is either skipped or simplified (scoping review adaptation noted)
Themes are identified and assigned to articles
Semantic claims include effect sizes from the abstracts (e.g., SMD, Cohen's d, RR)
stats.total_quantitative_claims equals the sum of all claims array lengths across articles
stats.total_semantic_claims equals the sum of all semantic_claims array lengths across articles
Chen article has a claim or semantic_claim containing SMD -0.42

evals.name: rapid-cdiff-missing-abstract
evals.prompt: Extract data for this rapid review on probiotics for recurrent C. difficile. Note that one article is missing its abstract.
evals.expected_output: extracted_claims.json handling the missing abstract case (article 1 flagged), claims from 2 articles with abstracts

assertions.text: review/extracted_claims.json exists after execution
Article at index 1 (Dubberke) is flagged as has_abstract: false
The missing abstract is noted as a limitation
Articles with abstracts have semantic_claims with claim_type fields
Quality assessment uses simplified approach (rapid review)
stats.total_quantitative_claims equals the sum of all claims array lengths across articles
stats.total_semantic_claims equals the sum of all semantic_claims array lengths across articles
Li article has a claim or semantic_claim containing RR 0.55
